untranslatable_reason: This signal is a portfolio-level volatility scaling rule, not a price-action trading rule. It requires: (1) multi-asset factor portfolio construction (fMVE), (2) time-series conditional volatility estimation on portfolio returns (σ̂²), and (3) dynamic position sizing via inverse volatility weighting. None of these operations are expressible using single-instrument price indicators (close, RSI, ATR, etc.). The signal operates at the portfolio optimization layer, not the individual bar/candle level. Requires custom portfolio backtester with factor model and GARCH/rolling volatility estimation.
translation_notes: Signal SSRN_2659431_11 describes a volatility-managed portfolio construction methodology from academic research. Entry/exit conditions reference factor portfolio returns and conditional volatility estimates that cannot be computed from standard OHLCV indicators. This is a position-sizing/rebalancing rule for a multi-factor strategy, not a directional trading signal suitable for traditional bar-by-bar backtesting.
